title: GitStatus
description: git.status — structured repository status. Returns the current branch, tracking information, and lists of changed files. Designed to power a compact StatusBar pill as well as richer Git panels. The daemon shells out to `git` (porcelain v1 + --ahead-behind) and parses the result; no heavy git library dependency.

path.description: Optional subdirectory to scope the status to (defaults to workspace root). Useful for monorepos.
Workspace-relative path of the changed file.

old_path.description: For renamed files, the previous path.

status.description: High-level status. 'modified' covers both staged and unstaged modifications.

staged.description: True if the change is staged (index differs from HEAD).

branch.description: Current branch name (or 'HEAD' / detached SHA for detached HEAD state).

ahead.description: Number of commits this branch is ahead of upstream.

behind.description: Number of commits this branch is behind upstream.

changes.description: All changes (staged + unstaged + untracked). Sorted by path.

clean.description: True when there are no changes of any kind (working tree clean).
